name: go2-foxglove
description: Stream a Unitree Go2's live data into Foxglove: LiDAR point cloud, pose + TF, body state (IMU/battery/foot/joints) and UWB over one Foxglove WebSocket, plus the front camera (WebRTC, forwarded into the same connection). Ships a ready-made Foxglove layout. A lighter cousin of go2-watchtower.

variables.name: FOXGLOVE_PORT
variables.description: Port for the Foxglove WebSocket — open Foxglove → Open Connection → ws://<device>:<port>

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 robot IP on the robot LAN (WebRTC camera)

variables.name: GO2_DDS_ADDRESS
variables.description: THIS device's OWN IP on the robot network — the address DDS binds to so the Go2 can talk back. On the Go2's onboard Jetson it's usually 192.168.123.18; on an external Jetson bridged to the robot LAN it's that machine's 192.168.123.x. Binding by IP (not interface name) avoids the multi-homed eth0/eth1 problem where DDS advertises the wrong subnet.
variables.prompt: This device's IP on the Go2 network
